mapper.insert: INSERT INTO performance_section_override (performance_id, section_id, is_active, custom_rows, custom_seats_per_row, note) VALUES (#{performanceId}, #{sectionId}, #{active}, #{customRows}, #{customSeatsPerRow}, #{note}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_active = VALUES(is_active), custom_rows = VALUES(custom_rows), custom_seats_per_row = VALUES(custom_seats_per_row), note = VALUES(note)
mapper.select: SELECT pso.*, vs.section_name, vs.section_type FROM performance_section_override pso JOIN venue_section vs ON pso.section_id = vs.section_id WHERE pso.performance_id = #{performanceId} ORDER BY vs.display_order
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM performance_section_override WHERE performance_id = #{performanceId} AND section_id = #{sectionId}
